The number of pages from each bill to include
You will receive an email when you have a bulk download ready.
You will no longer have bulk downloads automatically zipped for you. However, you can still login and manual generate a bulk download.
settings.bulkDownloadPreferences.intro: Downloading bills in bulk is simple in Payreq. Let us know how you’d like your bills packaged and we'll send you an email when they’ve arrived and are ready for download.
settings.bulkDownloadPreferences.howItWo: Let’s say you’ve been sent 100 rate notices from your local council. The following morning you’ll receive an email from Payreq letting you know that they have been zipped up and are read for download. If you’ve told us your preference is for individual PDFs, then the zip file will contain 100 PDFs, one for each property. If you’ve told us your preference is for a single merged PDF, then the zip file will contain 1 large PDF containing all 100 rate notices.
settings.bulkDownloadPreferences.optionR: Unsure which download option is best for you?

changePassword.suggestions.1: Use a few words, avoid common phrases
changePassword.suggestions.2: No need for symbols, digits, or uppercase letters
changePassword.suggestions.3: Straight rows of keys are easy to guess
changePassword.suggestions.4: Short keyboard patterns are easy to guess
changePassword.suggestions.5: Use a longer keyboard pattern with more turns
changePassword.suggestions.6: Repeats like 'aaa' are easy to guess
changePassword.suggestions.7: Repeats like 'abcabcabc' are only slightly harder to guess than 'abc'
changePassword.suggestions.9: Sequences like abc or 6543 are easy to guess
changePassword.suggestions.11: Recent years are easy to guess
changePassword.suggestions.13: Avoid years that are associated with you
changePassword.suggestions.14: Dates are often easy to guess
changePassword.suggestions.15: Avoid dates and years that are associated with you
changePassword.suggestions.16: This is a top-10 common password
changePassword.suggestions.17: This is a top-100 common password
changePassword.suggestions.18: This is a very common password
changePassword.suggestions.19: This is similar to a commonly used password
changePassword.suggestions.20: A word by itself is easy to guess
changePassword.suggestions.21: Names and surnames by themselves are easy to guess
changePassword.suggestions.22: Common names and surnames are easy to guess
changePassword.suggestions.24: All-uppercase is almost as easy to guess as all-lowercase
changePassword.suggestions.25: Reversed words aren't much harder to guess
changePassword.suggestions.26: Predictable substitutions like '@' instead of 'a' don't help very much
changePassword.suggestions.27: Add another word or two. Uncommon words are better.

registrations.createReckon.connectionErr: Payreq was unable to access your Reckon account. Please update your Reckon connection details.
registrations.createReckon.connectDetail: Enter the following information to connect your Reckon account:
How to find your Reckon company file path?
Click here for more information on finding your company file path.
For a company file that is not shared with other users Q:\File name.QBW E.g. Q:\API2019.QBW

For a company file that is shared with other users \\Shared-Folder-Name\FileName.QBW or \\\\Shared-Folder-Name\\FileName.QBW or \\FS-Path\Full-Shared-Folder-Name\File name.QBW or \\\\FS-Path\\Full-Shared-Folder-Name\\File name.QBW E.g. \\\\api2019\\API2019.QBW or \\\\RAH-FSS-07-AP2A\\067185-1574783-API2019\\API2019.QBW
Reckon Accounts Hosted Company File Username
Reckon Accounts Hosted Company File Password

walkthrough.modal.preRebrand.title: New look Payreq coming soon
walkthrough.modal.preRebrand.intro: Payreq is rebranding with a new message, new logo and new colours. Look out for our new website and refreshed platform from 3 May.
walkthrough.modal.preRebrand.intro2: We hope you’ll like it as much as we do.
walkthrough.modal.postRebrand.title: Notice anything different?
walkthrough.modal.postRebrand.intro: Meet the new Payreq. We’ve updated our logo and our colours and launched a brand new website. It’s still the same great product, but with a fresher look. We hope you like it as much as we do.
walkthrough.modal.paymentsUpdate.title: New Features Now Available!
walkthrough.modal.paymentsUpdate.text1: Payreq now gives you greater visibility and control of your payments.
walkthrough.modal.paymentsUpdate.text2: Skip or edit a scheduled payment and see all of your past and upcoming scheduled payments in the newly named 'Payments' page (formerly 'Autopayments'). Then head over to the settings menu to manage your cards and autopayments.
